chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 978 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 19.11.2025 Mr. Hafiz Abdul Ghaffar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< The petitioner has also approached the Anti-Encroachment Tribunal, where order in his favour was passed. Counsel submits that for compliance of order passed by the Tribunal a letter was issued on 07.11.2024 to the Assistant Commissioner (Revenue) Pano Akil. Under these circumstances, this Petition being misconceived is hereby dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
